programme.desc: Susanna accepts help one day from Nate at her parents' store in Georgia. Sparks between them fly, but when a photo of them gets leaked to the press, Susanna is in for the shock of her life when Nate is called back home for his coronation as a king.

programme.title: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: Andie is devastated by the accidental death of a patient, but as she and the grieving mother overcome their sorrow through forgiveness, they soon learn that acceptance leads to hope.

programme.title: Wedding of Dreams
programme.desc: Debbie turns her back on the music business and finds true love. When her manager tries to pull her back into the limelight, she must decide whether music or love comes first.

programme.title: Love, of Course
programme.desc: A helicopter mom follows her daughter to college and lands a job on campus. When she meets a charismatic professor, she learns more about herself and discovers a life of her own.

programme.title: While You Were Dating
programme.desc: A divorced couple meet online and end up going on a blind date together. After an awkward reunion, they decide to set each other up with their friends, but old habits never quite die.
